title: Bave PVP pack
description: This is a 1.8.9 PVP pack that turns items to a 16x bright beach theme
body:
A 1.8.9 texture pack made by me. This supports ALL mod loaders and is meant for PVP/minigames, it changes the textures and models of diamond, leather, gold, iron and stone tools and armour. it also changes the texture of other items such as ender pearls and fireballs. I will update as soon as possible!
SebiPlayz1 is my Minecraft account. If you have any questions, Ask me in my discord server.
Special thanks to Zacgamingpro1234 for helping me, check him out :)
